creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port fails to build, because it touches the filesystem before the
install target is even called. A log is available at:
http://people.freebsd.org/~wxs/p5-DBIx-Class-Schema-Loader-0.04006.log

Can you please look into this. I will be available to test any patches
you want.

-- WXS
